name: Louisiana State Licensing Board for Contractors Contractor Search

agency.name: Louisiana State Licensing Board for Contractors

updateFrequency: unknown; the official search cautions that displayed information may not reflect recent changes
licenseTypesIncluded: Louisiana commercial and residential contractor licenses exposed by the official contractor search
Louisiana home improvement registrations and board classifications
Major, sub-, specialty, and credential classifications published by LSLBC
knownExclusions: The official search states that only currently licensed or registered contractors appear in search results.
Local permits, business registrations, and sources outside LSLBC scope are not represented by this source entry.
Project-value thresholds vary by license type and classification, including lower thresholds for electrical, mechanical, plumbing, pools, and hazardous-material work.
Some classifications require companion credentials from another Louisiana agency, including master plumber and Department of Environmental Quality credentials.
rateLimitNotes: No adapter is implemented. Any future access should respect lookup controls and the official disclaimer.
publicRecordsNotes: Official lookup source metadata only. The official source cautions that completeness and accuracy are not guaranteed; absence from this source is not proof that a license does not exist elsewhere.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: No official bulk download has been confirmed in this phase.
researchNotes: Registry-only source for Louisiana contractor verification. LSLBC publishes a detailed classification catalog covering all tracked statewide trade domains, but its lookup remains manual until access behavior, response stability, and reuse terms are adapter-reviewed.
maintainerNotes: Preserve the official caveat that lookup results may not reflect recent changes or updates, and expose the applicable project-value threshold and companion-credential caveats with any future result.

researchEvidence.note: Official public source, access shape, and current automation constraints reviewed.

The official classification catalog defines statewide commercial, residential, electrical, plumbing, mechanical, HVAC, roofing and sheet metal, swimming pool, solar, hazardous-material and asbestos, utility, and home-improvement scopes.
The official license-type page documents commercial, residential, home-improvement, and mold-remediation paths and their project-value thresholds.

blocker.summary: No stable, documented machine-readable official interface is currently suitable for an offline-tested adapter.
